{{# @name Social image @desc 1200×630 OG image based on the tour banner design. When the entry has a background photo (`image`, `card_image`, or the first `tour_photos` relation) it's full-bleed with a dark wash + gradient overlays and white text. Otherwise it falls back to the parchment background with the topographic decoration and dark text. #}} {{ get_content:id }} {{ has_image = (image || card_image || tour_photos) ? true : false }}
{{ if image }} {{ picture :image="image" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover" cover="true" sizes="1200px" }} {{ elseif card_image }} {{ picture :image="card_image" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover" cover="true" sizes="1200px" }} {{ elseif tour_photos }} {{ tour_photos }} {{ if first && image }} {{ picture :image="image" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover" cover="true" sizes="1200px" }} {{ /if }} {{ /tour_photos }} {{ else }}
{{ svg:top-left attr:class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-[320px] md:w-[400px] h-auto -translate-x-1/2 lg:-translate-x-1/4" }} {{ svg:top-right attr:class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[320px] md:w-[400px] h-auto" }}
{{ /if }} {{ if has_image }} {{# Uniform dark wash for centred-content contrast. #}}
{{# Top + bottom dark gradients to anchor the logo and the headline. #}}
{{# Subtle white topographic decoration over the photo. #}}
{{ svg:top-left attr:class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-[320px] md:w-[400px] h-auto -translate-x-1/2 lg:-translate-x-1/4" }} {{ svg:top-right attr:class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[320px] md:w-[400px] h-auto" }}
{{ /if }} {{# Centred wordmark, bottom of canvas — white over a photo, default colour over the parchment fallback. #}}
{{ partial:components/logo class="w-64 h-auto text-white" width="256" }}
{{# Foreground content — region pill (tours) or page-title chip (parchment fallback) + headline, centred. #}}
{{ chip_text = '' }} {{ if region }} {{ chip_text = region }} {{ elseif collection:handle == 'inspiration' || collection:handle == 'tips' }} {{ chip_text = collection:title }} {{ elseif !has_image }} {{ chip_text = title }} {{ /if }} {{ if chip_text }}

{{ chip_text }}

{{ /if }} {{ if has_image }} {{ partial:typography/h1_big_display :content="og_title ?? name ?? headline ?? title" class="!text-white max-w-4xl" }} {{ else }} {{ partial:typography/h1 :content="og_title ?? name ?? headline ?? title" class="max-w-4xl !text-4xl md:!text-[72px] !leading-[1.1] !tracking-[-0.02em]" }} {{ /if }}
{{ /get_content:id }}
